task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sprint Review' event is scheduled for Wednesday of next week from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM at the Engineering Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo calendar or event creation form, look for the title 'Sprint Review', the date set to Wednesday of next week, the time set to 14:00-15:00 (or 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM), and the location field containing 'Engineering Lab'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sprint Review' event includes the correct attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Sprint Review' event form, look for the attendees field containing 'David Chen', 'Emma Thompson', and 'Luis Fernandez'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Executive Briefing' event is scheduled for Wednesday of next week from 3:00 PM to 3:45 PM at the Board Room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo calendar or event creation form, look for the title 'Executive Briefing', the date set to Wednesday of next week, the time set to 15:00-15:45 (or 3:00 PM - 3:45 PM), and the location field containing 'Board Room'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Executive Briefing' event includes the correct attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Executive Briefing' event form, look for the attendees field containing 'Grace Patel', 'Henry Kim', and 'Bob Williams'.

task_completion.description: Verify both events are saved and appear back-to-back on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Odoo calendar view for Wednesday of next week. Both 'Sprint Review' and 'Executive Briefing' should be visible as saved events, with 'Executive Briefing' starting exactly when 'Sprint Review' ends (at 3:00 PM).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo web application running in a web browser, with its standard navigation bar, calendar view, and event forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GUI to create the events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent clicking on calendar slots, typing in form fields, and clicking 'Save' buttons, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the events appear naturally without HTML tampering.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calendar events and forms should look like standard Odoo UI elements without misaligned text, unusual fonts, or signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the display.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target Date: Wednesday of next week.
Meeting 1: 'Sprint Review', Time: 14:00-15:00 (2:00 PM - 3:00 PM), Location: Engineering Lab, Attendees: David Chen, Emma Thompson, Luis Fernandez.
Meeting 2: 'Executive Briefing', Time: 15:00-15:45 (3:00 PM - 3:45 PM), Location: Board Room, Attendees: Grace Patel, Henry Kim, Bob Williams.
Constraint: Executive Briefing must start exactly when Sprint Review ends (15:00).
